new.title: New evaluation
new.description: Record a propfirm challenge you've purchased. You can edit details later as the evaluation progresses.

edit.title: Edit evaluation
edit.description: Update the details of this evaluation.

fields.propfirmHint: Don't see your propfirm? Type its name and hit "Create".
fields.closedOnHint: Required when status is anything other than in progress.
fields.notesPlaceholder: Anything worth remembering about this challenge…

form.editStatusHint: To change status (mark as funded, failed, or log a reset), use the row actions menu.

logReset.description: Record a reset on this evaluation. The fee is added to the evaluation's total.

markFunded.title: Mark as funded
markFunded.description: When did this evaluation get funded? This sets the start of the payout window.

toasts.errorUndo: Undo partially failed — please refresh and check.

errors.dateBeforePurchase: Funded date cannot be before purchase date
errors.dateInFuture: Funded date cannot be in the future

emptyState.title: No evaluations yet
